utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present with plan details and monthly costs for physical and mental health; property_coverage is marked 'Not applicable or not revised' (not fully specified and no costs); travel_coverage is noted as 'Not a primary focus' with an add-on mention but no costs (not fully specified); additional_services includes a wellness add-on with a clear monthly cost; total_budget provides monthly and annual totals. Fully specified items with required details and costs: health_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Items not fully specified: property_coverage, travel_coverage.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) LifeFirst Enhanced Active Plan with details referencing LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health; (2) Wellness Programs Add-on at €200/month; (3) Travel coverage mentions an existing add-on: Sports Activity Coverage (adventure sports). From the ground-truth, the matching rated items are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health rating 9), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health rating 9), Wellness Programs (rating 3), and Adventure Travel Coverage (the only explicit adventure sports add-on; rating 10). The plan names and descriptions align with these ground-truth items.
